parameters.subject: You're crushing it — keep going! 💪
parameters.message:
BurpeePacers

You're crushing it! 🔥

Hey {{ $json.displayName }},

We just wanted to check in and say — you're doing something most people never will. Every rep counts, and every session you show up is a win.

Current Level

{{ $json.levelName }}

Keep that momentum going. Consistency is the difference between those who finish the program and those who wonder what it would have felt like. You're on the right side of that line. 💪

Continue Your Workout →

Keep pushing,
The BurpeePacers Team

parameters.subject: Your BurpeePacer journey is waiting 🏃
parameters.message:
BurpeePacers

Your journey starts now 🏃

Hey {{ $json.displayName }},

You took the first step and signed up — that already puts you ahead of most people. Now it's time for step two.

What to expect

✅ Start at Beginner Level 1 — just 20 burpees in 20 minutes

📈 Progress week by week — each level builds on the last

🎓 Graduate the program — 150 Navy Seals in 20 minutes

No experience needed. No equipment. Just you, your commitment, and 20 minutes a day. Thousands of people started exactly where you are right now.

Start Your First Workout →

See you out there,
The BurpeePacers Team
burpeepacers.com
